sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n60237" key="krupth/" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κρυπ-τή</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n60237.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">crypt, vault</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1240.tlg001:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Callix.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope></bibl>. </sense> <sense n="II" id="n60237.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">κρυπτός</ref> </xr> ad fin.</sense> </entryFree>
